g.text: Kprobe on Internal Function - Brittle Path

ul.li: High-granularity debugging of logic not exposed by hooks.
Capturing function local variables (requires DWARF info).
Developing production monitoring tools (e.g., bpftrace, datadog-agent).
Requirement for "compile once, run everywhere" (CO-RE) portability.
Targeting high-security environments where internal symbols are hidden.

div.p: tcp_set_state(sk, state) c void tcp_set_state( struct sock *sk, int new_state )
__tcp_set_state(sk, state, fast) c void __tcp_set_state( struct sock *sk, int new_state, bool fast_path // Signature Change! )
